title: Rosetta Brains: A Strategy for Molecularly-Annotated Connectomics
abstract: We propose a strategy for obtaining molecularly annotated connectomes by combining barcoding-based connectivity mapping with in situ sequencing of gene expression, creating a 'Rosetta Stone' linking molecular identity to connectivity.
notes: Visionary proposal connecting molecular identity to wiring. Links Kording, Boyden, Zador, Church.
